metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2155
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.7: Note: the authors show that activation (via disinhibition of afferent neurons using bicuculline) of synaptic NMDA receptors induce the translocation of jacob and importin-alpha1 to the nucleus. Caldendrin competes with importin-alpha1 at the synapse.

Note: This paper mentions to study 'Importin-α1'. The antibody used is Purified Mouse Anti-Karyopherin α Clone 2/Karyopherin α of db biosciences directed against Human Rch-1 aa. 254-497. This paper therefore investigates KPNA2, Karyopherin subunit alpha-2, Importin subunit alpha-1, SRP1-alpha protein.. Experimental description: "Hippocampal primary cultures were prepared according to Goslin and Banker [7] using 19d rat embryos."
